mapper.insert:
insert into agent_skill(id, agent_id, definition_desc, exec_content, return_data_format, create_time, update_time, status, reserver, remark) values
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.agentId}, #{entity.definitionDesc}, #{entity.execContent}, #{entity.returnDataFormat}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.reserver}, #{entity.remark})
